Class ProductDirector<T extends ProductBuilder<? extends Product>>

java.lang.Object
src.baseabstractions.AbstractDirector<T>
src.productcreation.ProductDirector<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the type of ProductBuilder this director works with
public class ProductDirector<T extends ProductBuilder<? extends Product>> extends AbstractDirector<T>
Director class for constructing Product objects with predefined configurations. Provides convenience methods for building fully initialized Product instances.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ProductDirector(T builder)
    Constructs a ProductDirector with the specified builder.

    Creates a fully initialized Product with all fields set.

  • Constructor Details

    • ProductDirector

      public ProductDirector(T builder)
      Constructs a ProductDirector with the specified builder.
      Parameters:
      builder - the ProductBuilder instance to be used by this director

  • Method Details

    • makeFull

      public void makeFull(long id, String name, Coordinates coordinates, LocalDateTime creationDate, long price, String partNumber, Long manufactureCost, UnitOfMeasure unitOfMeasure, Person owner)
      Creates a fully initialized Product with all fields set.
      Parameters:
      id - the product ID
      name - the product name
      coordinates - the product coordinates
      creationDate - the product creation date
      price - the product price
      partNumber - the product part number
      manufactureCost - the product manufacture cost
      unitOfMeasure - the product unit of measure
      owner - the product owner
